widget.name: Convey Modal Popup
widget.description: Dockable side modal that maximizes left/right and minimizes to a shared bottom tab bar

property.caption: Title
property.description: Shown in the panel header and the minimized dock tab

property.caption: Trigger
property.description: Clickable content that opens the modal

property.caption: Content
property.description: Widgets shown inside the maximized panel body

property.caption: Is open
property.description: Optional boolean attribute to open/close the modal from microflows or nanoflows

property.caption: Dock position
property.description: Side of the screen where the maximized panel opens

property.caption: Width
property.description: CSS width of the maximized panel (e.g. 480px or 40%)

property.caption: Height
property.description: CSS height of the maximized panel (e.g. 100% or 90vh)

property.caption: Top offset
property.description: CSS top offset for the maximized panel (e.g. 0 or 64px)

property.caption: Z-index
property.description: Stacking order of the panel and overlay

property.caption: Tab color
property.description: Background color of the minimized dock tab (hex or CSS color)

property.caption: Icon class
property.description: Optional CSS class for the tab/header icon (e.g. glyphicon glyphicon-file)

property.caption: Show overlay
property.description: Dim the page behind the maximized panel

property.caption: Close on overlay click
property.description: Close the modal when the dimmed overlay is clicked

property.caption: On open
property.description: Action executed when the modal opens

property.caption: On close
property.description: Action executed when the modal closes

property.caption: On minimize
property.description: Action executed when the modal is minimized to the dock

property.caption: On maximize
property.description: Action executed when the modal is restored from the dock
